enchant_outline.configuration.title: Enchant Outline Settings
enchant_outline.configuration.itemEnable: Enable the enchanted outline overlay for items.
enchant_outline.configuration.armorEnabl: Enable the enchanted outline overlay for armor.
enchant_outline.configuration.elytraEnab: Enable the enchanted outline overlay for the elytra.
enchant_outline.configuration.blockEntit: Enable the enchanted outline overlay for custom models being held (shields / tridents).
enchant_outline.configuration.thrownTrid: Enable the enchanted outline overlay for the thrown trident.
enchant_outline.configuration.outlineSiz: Adjust the thickness of the enchanted outline overlay. Please don't go over 0.2...
enchant_outline.configuration.color.desc: Choose the RGBA for the enchanted outline overlay.
Enables the glint outline effect for items inside your inventory, chests, and crafting menus.
enchant_outline.configuration.allEnchant: Bypasses standard vanilla isFoil flags. May cause unwanted side effects but most of the options below require this to be enabled.
enchant_outline.configuration.silentGear: Turn on to fix Silent Gear tool displays!
Your Cataclysm weapons look way cooler with this!
enchant_outline.configuration.slash.desc: The blades are scuffed without this
enchant_outline.configuration.blacklistI: A list of item IDs (e.g., 'minecraft:barrier') that should not receive the glow outline effect.
A list of item IDs (e.g., 'minecraft:barrier') that would use another specified color.
